subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in Paris | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-8669
body: Intelligence from Paris indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the meeting banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-8669. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
